chapter_title.en: Chapter 87 – The one who clothes a Momin

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/135)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/135)
text: مَنْ كَسَا مُؤْمِناً كَسَاهُ اللَّهُ مِنَ الثِّيَابِ الْخُضْرِ
وَ قَالَ فِي حَدِيثٍ آخَرَ لَا يَزَالُ فِي ضَمَانِ اللَّهِ مَا دَامَ عَلَيْهِ سِلْكٌ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Hammad Bin Isa, from Ibrahim Bin Umar, from Abu Hamza Al Sumaly,
(It has been narrated) from Aliasws Bin Al-Husaynasws having said: ‘The one who clothes a Momin, Allahazwj would Clothe him from the green clothes’.
And he<sup>asws</sup> said in another Hadeeth: ‘He will not cease to be in the Guarantee of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> for as long as there is a fibre (from that cloth) upon him’.
en.sarwar: 4. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from Hammad ibn ‘Isa from Ibrahim ibn ‘Umar from abu Hamza al-Thumali from Ali ibn al-Husayn (a.s.) who has said the following: ’’Whoever provides clothes for a believer, for his reward Allah will dress him all in green.’ In another Hadith he said, ‘He will live under the protection of Allah as long as a fiber of that clothes is on him (believer).’”
